title: Freon Drevan

'''Freon Drevan''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] who ran a [[Freon Drevan's bootlegging business|bootlegging business]] on his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]] prior to [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. After he promoted factory worker [[Niai Fieso]] to a position as his right–[[Limb/Legends|hands]] Xexto, the two expanded the business into a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation. An ambitious Fieso eventually sold Drevan out to authorities before fleeing with all of their [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and Drevan was [[Prisoner/Legends|jailed]]. He was a free being by 32 BBY, a [[Standard year/Legends|year]] in which he attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and saw Fieso in the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|stadium's]] audience. A [[Unarmed combat/Legends|brawl]] erupted, and both Xexto were taken to a [[Mos Espa jail|local jail]].

==Biography==
Freon Drevan was a [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]]<ref name="ccg" /> [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="cswe" /> from<ref name="db" /> his<ref name="ccg" /> [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]<ref name="Alien Anthology">''[[Alien Anthology]]''</ref> of [[Troiken/Legends|Troiken]].<ref name="db" /> Prior to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> he was a [[Freon Drevan's bootlegging business|business]] owner on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="db" /> Although his operation was licensed,<ref name="ccg" /> Drevan was in fact a [[Con artist/Legends|con artist]] whose factories produced bootleg merchandise related to [[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]], a famous Xexto [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|Podracer]]. When Drevan noticed the swindling talents of [[Niai Fieso]], he promoted the young factory drudge to a position as his right–[[Limb/Legends|hands]] Xexto. Working together, the two expanded Drevan's business into a well–known [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] organization that dealt in various illegal products.<ref name="db" />

Fieso eventually grew weary of his position as Drevan's inferior and began to siphon [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from [[Spice/Legends|spice]] smuggling operations. He additionally tipped off authorities to Drevan's illegal activities<ref name="db" /> and fled the [[Troiken system/Legends|Troiken system]]<ref name="ccg" /> with all of the business's profits.<ref name="cswe" /> A subsequent raid on the smuggling operation landed Drevan in [[Prison/Legends|prison]],<ref name="db" /> lost him his business license,<ref name="ccg" /> and left him a creditless being<ref name="cswe" /> with a large tax debt.<ref name="ccg" />

By 32 BBY,<ref name="NEC" /> Drevan was no longer a [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]]. In that year, he attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[Podracing/Legends|Podrace]] in the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] on the planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Seated in the audience, Drevan followed the progress of the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] racer [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] as the competitor completed the first of the race's three laps.<ref name="The Phantom Menace">{{Film|I}}</ref> After the [[Youngling/Legends|young]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] began his own second lap,<ref name="DVD">{{Film|I}} [[Star Wars home video releases#Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace|DVD release]]</ref> Drevan spotted Fieso, who was working in the arena as a food vendor. Drevan approached his former apprentice from behind and punched him in the face thrice. A full-on [[Unarmed combat/Legends|skirmish]] broke out, and both Drevan and Fieso were taken to a [[Mos Espa jail|local jail]].<ref name="db" />

==Personality and traits==
Freon Drevan was a [[Color/Legends|white]]–skinned individual with black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]<ref name="ccg" /> who worked as a bootlegger and a smuggler, employing others in his illegal operation. Drevan was impressed by Niai Fieso's friendly demeanor and how it was used to swindle others, but he later attacked him from behind in a crowded arena<ref name="db" /> after Fieso's betrayal cost him both his business<ref name="ccg" /> and his credits.<ref name="cswe" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Freon was created for a CCG card game. Seeing the story–potential I decided to make this Xexto Vendor the partner who scammed all the money off Freon.|Sander de Lange, on his development of Niai Fieso's biography|<ref name="blog">{{Blog|exar_xan|13|Behind the story - Niai Fieso}}</ref>}}
[[File:Xextovendor.jpg|thumb|left|175px|Sander de Lange retconned Niai Fieso into being Freon Drevan's previously unnamed business partner.]]
Freon Drevan's first appearance in ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[canon]] was in the [[1999]] film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], in which he appeared as a background [[Alien/Legends|alien]] visible in the audience during the film's Podracing sequence.<ref name="The Phantom Menace" /> He was given a name in the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]{{'s}} [[2001]] ''[[Coruscant Limited]]'' expansion set, which also established that Drevan had been left bankrupt following the betrayal of a business partner.<ref name="ccg" />

The vague character biography given by ''Coruscant Limited'' was expanded upon by fan [[Sander de Lange]] through [[StarWars.com]]'s "[[What's The Story?]]" contest, which allowed fans to write and submit entries for the website's [[Databank (original)|Databank]]. While writing an entry on Niai Fieso<ref name="blog" />—a Xexto food vendor seen in the extended Podracing sequence on ''The Phantom Menace''{{'s}} [[Star Wars home video releases#Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace|DVD release]]<ref name="DVD" />—de Lange chose Drevan over the Xexto [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Tosinqas]] while seeking an existing character of Fieso's species to work into his biography.<ref name="blog" />

Both Drevan and Fieso were present at the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Podrace]], and de Lange accordingly saw story potential in the connection; as Fieso had no existing biography, de Lange [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] him into being Drevan's former business partner. He intentionally left an open-ended conclusion to the two characters' stories in order to allow for future expansion by other authors. De Lange's entry was ultimately accepted and published online in [[2007]].<ref name="blog" />
